economic_hardship.label: Economic Hardship
economic_hardship.description: Combines poverty, unemployment, and (inverted) median income. Higher score = more economic hardship.

demographic_composition.label: Latino/Foreign-Born Composition
demographic_composition.description: Combines Latino and foreign-born population shares. Higher score = greater share of these populations.

industry_profile.label: Goods-Producing Industry
industry_profile.description: Combines employment shares in agriculture, construction, and manufacturing. Higher score = more goods-producing economy.

education.label: Educational Attainment
education.description: Share of adults with higher education. Higher score = higher educational attainment.

civic_power.label: Civic Power
civic_power.description: Count of Latino elected officials. Higher score = more Latino political representation.

public_safety.label: Violent Crime Burden
public_safety.description: Violent crime rate. Higher score = higher crime burden.
